texto: Do dogs understand death? Do they have souls? Do they go to heaven? I have alway believed so, but this [event] confirmed that all of God's creatures , humans and animals, have a soul and that we will all be reunited in heaven. My pastor once told me, "If there are no dogs in heaven, I don't want to go." I agree.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Glenwood McNabb que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Do dogs understand death? Do they have souls? Do they go to heaven? I have alway believed so, but…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, afterlife, death, com foco em luto e inspiracao.
